diagnosis.final_diagnosis: high-grade diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (DLBCL) with HIV
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The final diagnosis of high-grade DLBCL was supported by the patient's history of previously diagnosed high-grade DLBCL and the ongoing need for chemotherapy. The patient's HIV status, currently well-controlled on ART, was also noted as an important factor in his treatment and recovery.
